metadata.description: AgroVolt Vision AI — Worldwide Crop Disease & Solar Panel Knowledge Base

crop_disease.specs: 2,598 real-world images, 13 plant species, 17 disease classes, XML bounding box annotations
crop_disease.advantage: Real-field backgrounds (noisy, complex) vs PlantVillage lab-controlled sterile backgrounds
crop_disease.secondary: PlantVillage (54K images) — used for transfer learning pre-training only

crop_identification.specs: Millions of smartphone-captured plant images worldwide
crop_identification.advantage: Crowdsourced from real users globally — massive species diversity
crop_identification.secondary: Roboflow Universe Leaf Crop Identification (cleaned, augmented)

solar_panel.specs: IR + visible light imagery of panel defects
solar_panel.advantage: Enables smartphone-based fault detection replacing expensive thermal drones

model_architecture.stage_2_detector: YOLOv8-Nano — real-time bounding box disease/defect detection
model_architecture.stage_3_context: LLM Context Injector — weather + farm history + economic impact
model_architecture.transfer_learning: Fine-tuned YOLOv8n on PlantDoc (2x accuracy vs training from scratch)

Tomato.symptoms: Dark brown concentric rings on older leaves, moving upward
Tomato.organic_alt: Spray copper fungicide or neem oil @ 5ml/L

Tomato.symptoms: Water-soaked lesions turning brown-black, white fungal growth underneath
Tomato.spread_risk: CRITICAL — can destroy entire crop in 7-10 days

Tomato.symptoms: Small dark water-soaked spots on leaves, raised bumps on fruit
Upward curling of leaves, stunted growth, yellow margins
treatment: Control whitefly vector with neem oil

Tomato.symptoms: Small circular spots with dark borders and gray centers on lower leaves
treatment: Stake plants for better air flow
Tomato.spread_risk: HIGH – spreads from bottom to top

Tomato.symptoms: Mottled light/dark green pattern, leaf distortion, stunting
treatment: Do NOT smoke near plants (tobacco mosaic)
Tomato.organic_alt: Milk spray (1:9 ratio) as viral inhibitor
Preventive neem oil spray every 14 days

Rice.symptoms: Diamond-shaped lesions with gray center and brown border
Rice.spread_risk: CRITICAL in high humidity + moderate temperature

Rice.symptoms: Oval brown spots with yellow halos on leaves
Yellow-to-white lesions from leaf tip, wavy leaf margins
Rice.spread_risk: HIGH in flooded conditions + storm damage

Rice.symptoms: Irregular greenish-gray spots on leaf sheaths, banded pattern
Rice.spread_risk: HIGH in dense plantings with high nitrogen

Wheat.symptoms: Orange-brown pustules on leaves and stems
treatment: Apply at first sign of pustules
Wheat.spread_risk: CRITICAL — airborne spores travel 100s of km

Wheat.symptoms: White powdery patches on leaves and stems
Wheat.organic_alt: Milk spray or baking soda solution

Wheat.symptoms: Black powdery mass in infected grains, fishy odor
Wheat.spread_risk: HIGH — quarantine pest, export ban risk

Potato.symptoms: Dark brown concentric ring lesions on older leaves
Water-soaked dark patches, white fungal growth on underside

Grape.symptoms: Yellow oil spots on upper surface, white downy growth below
White powdery coating on leaves, shoots, and berries
Brown circular leaf spots, mummified black berries
treatment: Apply at 10-14 day intervals in wet season

Apple.symptoms: Olive-green to brown velvety spots on leaves and fruit
treatment: Apply at bud break + petal fall

Apple.symptoms: Bright orange-yellow spots on upper leaf surface
Frogeye leaf spots, rotting fruit with concentric rings
treatment: Remove mummified fruit and dead wood
Apply Captan at pink bud stage

Maize.symptoms: Long elliptical gray-green lesions (3-15 cm) on leaves
Maize.spread_risk: HIGH in moderate temp + high humidity

Maize.symptoms: Ragged feeding holes in whorl, frass (sawdust-like excrement)
Maize.organic_alt: Neem oil 5ml/L + Bt spray + sand+lime in whorl

Maize.symptoms: Rectangular gray lesions between veins, parallel to midrib

Cotton.symptoms: Bore holes in bolls, frass, boll shedding
Angular water-soaked lesions on leaves, blackarm on stems

Coffee.symptoms: Orange-yellow powdery pustules on leaf undersides
Small holes in berries, tunneling damage, premature drop

Turmeric.symptoms: Yellowing pseudostems, water-soaked rhizomes, foul smell
Brown oval spots on leaves with yellow halos

Soybean.symptoms: Tan to reddish-brown lesions on lower leaves
Soybean.spread_risk: HIGH — airborne spores travel long distances

Groundnut.symptoms: Circular dark brown spots on leaflets, premature defoliation

Millet.symptoms: Chlorosis in streaks, white fungal growth on leaf undersides, green ear
treatment: Remove and destroy green ear heads

Citrus.symptoms: Raised brown cork-like lesions with yellow halos on leaves, fruit, stems
Asymmetric blotchy mottling, lopsided fruit, bitter taste
treatment: There is NO CURE — management only
Citrus.organic_alt: Neem oil for psyllid control + tree removal

Pepper.symptoms: Small water-soaked spots becoming brown and papery

Strawberry.symptoms: Irregular purple spots merging into scorched appearance

Cherry.symptoms: White powdery patches on new growth and leaf undersides

panel_defects.symptoms: Uniform layer of fine particulate on glass surface
action: Clean panel surface with soft cloth and water
Schedule cleaning every 2 weeks in dry season
Consider automated cleaning system
Apply anti-soiling coating

panel_defects.symptoms: Silver/brown lines (snail trails) across cell surfaces, visible under oblique light
action: Mark panel for replacement during next maintenance
Monitor output decline with inverter data
File warranty claim if within coverage
Do NOT attempt field repair — risk of electric shock
panel_defects.detection_method: RGB edge detection + IR thermal differential

panel_defects.symptoms: Localized overheating detected via thermal imaging, browning/yellowing of cells
action: ⚠️ DISCONNECT panel immediately — FIRE RISK
Check for cell damage or solder joint failure
Replace panel if hot spot confirmed
Inspect adjacent panels for cascade risk
panel_defects.detection_method: IR thermal imaging + RGB discoloration analysis

panel_defects.symptoms: Localized opaque white/brown deposits, often on edges
action: Clean affected area with warm water (not cold — thermal shock risk)
Install bird deterrent spikes on mounting rails
Apply anti-perch wire
Schedule regular cleaning after nesting season

panel_defects.symptoms: Bubbles or cloudy areas between glass and backsheet, moisture ingress
action: Schedule replacement — structural integrity compromised
Monitor for continued degradation
Check warranty coverage (manufacturing defect)
Reduce electrical load on affected string

panel_defects.symptoms: Consistent power loss across modules, no visible damage, uneven cell brightness in EL imaging
action: Check grounding configuration
Install PID recovery box (overnight reverse voltage)
Replace ground fault on negative terminal
Consider module-level power electronics (MLPE)

panel_defects.symptoms: Partial shadow from nearby trees, grass growth reaching panel edge
action: Trim vegetation immediately
Schedule quarterly vegetation management
Consider panel height adjustment
Install weed barrier beneath array
Panel is in good condition ✓
Next inspection in 30 days
